title: Audio File Size Calculator
desc: Calculate audio file size from duration, sample rate, and bit depth. Estimate WAV, MP3, FLAC sizes. Free audio file size calculator.

title: Online Metronome
desc: Free online metronome with adjustable BPM. Practice music timing with visual and audio beats. Time signatures and accent patterns.

title: Online Audio Recorder
desc: Record audio from microphone in browser. Save as WAV/WebM. No upload, all processing local. Free online voice recorder.

title: BPM Counter
desc: Tap to count BPM (beats per minute). Find the tempo of any song by tapping along. Free online BPM tapper for musicians and DJs.

title: BPM Detector
desc: Detect BPM by tapping. Find song tempo by clicking. Free BPM tapper and detector.

title: BPM Tap Counter
desc: Find BPM by tapping a rhythm. Tap any key to detect song tempo. Free BPM tap counter for musicians and DJs.

title: Chord Progression Generator
desc: Generate chord progressions in any key. Free chord progression tool.

title: Chord Progressions Reference
desc: Common chord progressions in popular music. Find progressions by genre with examples. Free chord progression reference.

title: Guitar Chord Finder
desc: Find guitar chord shapes. All positions, fingerings. Free guitar chord finder.

title: Guitar String Tension Calculator
desc: Calculate guitar string tension for any tuning. Find correct string gauge for drop tunings. Free guitar string tension calculator.

title: Guitar Tuner Reference
desc: Reference tones for tuning guitar. Standard EADGBE, drop D, open tunings. Free online guitar tuner with reference tones for each string.

title: Key Signature Identifier
desc: Identify musical key signatures and scales. Free music theory tool.

title: Metronome BPM Tapper
desc: Tap to find BPM or use as metronome. Free BPM tapper and metronome.

title: Tempo Marking Reference
desc: Italian tempo markings reference with BPM ranges. Largo to presto markings. Free music tempo guide.

title: Music Key Transposer
desc: Transpose music chords and notes between keys. Capo positions. Free music transposer.

title: Music Note Frequency Calculator
desc: Calculate frequency of musical notes. Convert note names to Hz based on A4=440Hz standard tuning. Free music frequency calculator.

title: Music Note Frequency Calculator
desc: Calculate frequencies of musical notes. Find note frequencies for any octave based on A4=440Hz. Free online music note frequency calculator.

title: Music Transpose Calculator
desc: Transpose music between keys. Convert chords, notes, scales. Free music transposition tool.

title: Song Key Detector
desc: Find musical key from chords. Identify major/minor keys. Circle of fifths reference. Free song key finder.

title: Tone Generator
desc: Generate pure audio tones at any frequency. Sine, square, sawtooth, triangle waveforms. Free online tone generator for testing hearing.

title: White Noise Generator
desc: Generate white, pink, brown noise for sleep, focus, tinnitus relief. Adjustable volume and duration. Free online noise generator.
